prompt: Create a vertical hard-boiled western outlaw poster in polished Rockstar Games official concept art style, dramatic graphic-novel rendering with crisp inked edges, high contrast, painterly highlights, and gritty cinematic shading. A single cowboy gunslinger occupies the lower 75% of the frame while the top 25% remains strictly empty solid blood-red background. The character is centered and viewed from the waist up, looming forward in a confrontational pose, aiming a large silver revolver directly at the viewer with strong foreshortening so the gun barrel dominates the foreground and the hand is large and detailed. The face is intentionally obscured by a centered rectangular censor block with a dark-to-brown vertical gradient, covering the face from below the hat brim to the upper chest. The outlaw wears a glossy black wide-brim cowboy hat, dark blue long-sleeve shirt, deep red waistcoat, black neck scarf, and a brown diagonal bandolier loaded with individual brass bullets across the chest. Behind him is a large rough-edged golden-yellow circular sunset disk with black pine tree silhouettes at its lower edge, set against a deep red grunge sky. Along the bottom foreground, add exactly seven black silhouettes of mounted riders on horseback crossing a curved ridge line. No text, no logo, no watermark, no extra characters besides the main gunslinger and the seven rider silhouettes. Use solid blood-red, golden yellow, large silver revolver, deep red waistcoat, and centered dark-to-brown rectangular censor block.
